pages.title: Human Rights
pages.text: Make any pride flag out of valid tree blocks (logs/leaves) and have it connect back to your heart log.$(br)$(br)You will need to complete other challenges to get the required blocks.

pages.title: Reward
pages.text: Gain a skyris sapling. It counts as a descendant of your heart log. Its vines count as part of your tree. You still cannot absorb other skyris trees. (Craft it into planks to avoid accidental placement)$(br)$(br)The wander radius is increased by 1 block.
